title: Disable Train Trapdoors
description: A simple one mixin mod to disable the ability to open and close trapdoors on Create mod trains.
body:
![Mod Icon](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/EliConstructor/disable-train-trapdoor/master/src/main/resources/assets/traintrapdoordisabler/icon.png)
# Disable Train Trapdoors
This is a simple one mixin Fabric mod that simply disables the ability to open and close trapdoors on Create mod trains. This might sound like a downgrade to you, however, if you build trains with trapdoor walls to keep them around 3 blocks wide while still having space inside, like I do, this is very useful to prevent the trapdoors from being accidentally (or purposefully) opened which not only looks ugly but also can hit a player when passing. Doors can still be interacted with.

Of course, this mod requires [Create Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric)
